name: TV Stations
description: Creates virtual Live TV channels from your media library, organized by genre. Separate channel groups for Movies and Shows.
overview: TV Stations automatically generates genre-based TV channels from your Jellyfin library. Browse live channels like 'Action Movies', 'Drama Shows', and more — complete with an Electronic Program Guide showing what is on now and what is coming up next.

versions.changelog: Initial release. Genre-based virtual TV channels for Movies (ch 100+) and Shows (ch 200+) with EPG support.
